description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, featuring a dark gable roof and white exterior walls accented by light wood trim. The front facade includes a covered entryway and several symmetrically placed windows, while the rear side has a spacious wooden deck or porch area. A detached garage with a matching roof sits adjacent to the main building, connected by a paved driveway. The property is set on a green lawn with a slightly irregular boundary, and the overall design is modern yet simple, emphasizing functionality and clean lines. The windows are rectangular and evenly distributed, providing ample natural light. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, wood, and glass, with a solid, durable appearance suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, white walls, wood accents, and a detached garage on a green lawn. Features include a covered entry, rear porch, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and the detached garage with driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the gable roof, and minimal window presence on the end wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden porch/deck, additional windows, and the garage set back from the main building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and a large window or door leading to the backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
